concepts: inventory-reset reclaim after flush and value re-entry

thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. ETH/1h channel shortbias now has multiple passing branches, but recent history still carries heavy ETH-family concentration and the last cycle already returned to 4h exploration on SOL with zero-trade outcomes. Rotate away from both the ETH exploit lane and the slow 4h continuation lane while staying inside the supported universe. Target AXS 1h and demand 3 materially different specs around negative-funding exhaustion rather than another pure continuation batch: one fast flush-and-reclaim reversal, one opening-range displacement fade that only triggers when funding remains skewed and momentum stalls, and one value re-entry / inventory-reset setup after liquidation-style downside excess. Do not clone ETH failed-continuation shorts, do not reuse SOL/DOGE low-trade 4h continuation geometry, and do not spray tiny threshold edits.
stop_condition: Stop the batch when either (A) one spec reaches walk-forward QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 9.0, or (B) 4 materially different specs are exhausted without a pass. Abort any spec with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.00, or max_drawdown_pct > 12.0.
rotation_reason: Force exploration this cycle: soft 70/30 balance still favors explore, ETH-family attention is already concentrated by the only valid exploit lane, and the last cycle already consumed another supported 4h continuation batch, so AXS/1h is the cleaner supported rotation.
